N28 明吉摩选区
政绩成就报告 N28 Mengkibol Constituency
Achievement Report
Laporan Pencapaian DUN N28 Mengkibol · Kluang, Johor DUN N28 Mengkibol · Kluang, Johor · 2022–2026
议员姓名Assemblyman
—
周忠信 Chew Chong Sin
选区Constituency
—
N28 明吉摩（Mengkibol），居銮县，柔佛州 N28 Mengkibol, Kluang District, Johor
党籍Party
—
民主行动党（DAP）/ 希望联盟 Pakatan Harapan Democratic Action Party (DAP) / Pakatan Harapan
任期Term
—
2022年州议会选举当选，至今（2026年） Elected in 2022 State Election, serving to present (2026)
2022
当选年份Elected
13
✅ 已落实✅ Done
8
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress
21
总项目数Total Initiatives
一
慈善福利Charity & Welfare
🎓
奖励SPM 10A优秀生每人 RM300 RM300 Award for SPM 10A Students
为SPM考试中考获10A佳绩的优秀学生颁发奖励金，表扬卓越学业成就，激励明吉摩区学子精益求精。颁奖典礼已举办，奖励金已亲手移交。 Presented RM300 cash awards to students who achieved 10As in SPM, recognising academic excellence and motivating students in the Mengkibol constituency. Ceremony held and awards personally presented.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2024年7月July 2024 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🧺
发放食物篮援助 B40 低收入家庭 Food Basket Distribution for B40 Families
议员办公室于年底派发食物篮，援助区内B40低收入家庭，减轻贫困群体生活负担，落实社区关怀行动。 The service centre distributed food baskets to B40 low-income households in the constituency at year-end, alleviating financial burden and demonstrating community care.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2024年12月December 2024 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🏥
捐赠椅子及躺椅予明吉摩健康诊所及居銮中央医院 Chair & Recliner Donation to Mengkibol Clinic & Kluang Hospital
移交椅子及躺椅等设备予政府健康诊所及居銮中央医院，改善诊所就医环境与病患等候设施，提升社区医疗服务品质。 Donated chairs and recliners to the Mengkibol government health clinic and Kluang Central Hospital, improving waiting facilities and enhancing the quality of community healthcare.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2024年11月November 2024 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🛡️
赞助100名小贩参加社会保险（PERKESO） Sponsored 100 Hawkers to Register with PERKESO
协助并赞助100名小贩申请社会保险，保障小本经营者在意外或患病时的基本社会保障权益。100个名额已全数完成申请注册。 Assisted and sponsored 100 hawkers to enrol in PERKESO social insurance, safeguarding small business owners against accidents and illness. All 100 registrations completed.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2024年6月June 2024 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
💝
发起慈善日援助金募集活动 Charity Day Fundraising Campaign
促进社区响应慈善日，发起募集援助金活动，汇聚社区力量，为区内有需要的弱势群体提供经济援助与关爱。活动已圆满举行。 Organised a community fundraising drive for Charity Day, uniting residents to provide financial aid and support for vulnerable groups in the constituency. Event successfully concluded.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2025年8月August 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
二
基础建设Infrastructure
💧
争取居銮史上最大治水工程——拨款 9.7亿令吉 Secured RM970 Million — Kluang's Largest-Ever Flood Mitigation Project
成功争取高达9.7亿令吉的史上最大规模治水工程拨款，从根本解决居銮长年水患问题，保障居民家园安全。拨款已获中央政府批准。 Successfully secured RM970 million — the largest flood mitigation allocation in Kluang's history — to fundamentally address chronic flooding issues and protect residents' homes. Federal approval obtained.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2025年6月June 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🏗️
促成立跨部门特工队三管齐下根治水灾 Advocating for Cross-Agency Flood Task Force
提倡成立跨部门防洪特工队，整合工程、规划与应急管理资源，系统性解决居銮水灾问题。建议已提出，特工队是否正式成立仍待当局公布。 Proposed the formation of a cross-agency flood task force integrating engineering, planning and emergency management resources for a systematic solution to Kluang's flooding. Awaiting official announcement.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2025年3月March 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🏘️
推动居銮市议会成立专案小组解决霸王村土地问题 Task Force Established to Resolve Squatter Village Land Issues
推动居銮市议会成立专案小组，专门处理长期悬而未决的霸王村土地规划与合法化问题，保障居民权益。专案小组已正式成立。 Initiated the formation of a special task force under Kluang Municipal Council to handle long-unresolved squatter village land planning and legalisation matters. Task force officially established.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2025年3月March 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🛣️
发动联署请愿促完成居銮道路贯穿衔接工程 Petition Drive to Complete Kluang Road Connectivity Works
发动大规模网络联署请愿，促请当局尽快完成久拖未决的居銮道路贯穿衔接工程，提升区内交通顺畅度。联署已提交，工程进度仍有待跟进。 Launched a large-scale online petition urging authorities to complete the long-delayed Kluang road connectivity works and improve traffic flow. Petition submitted; progress pending follow-up.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2022年9月September 2022 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🚆
ETS双轨电动火车优化——逾万游子顺利返居銮 ETS Double-Track Optimisation — Over 10,000 Return Home for CNY
推动ETS双轨道电动火车服务优化后，2026年农历新年假期超过一万名旅居外地游子得以顺利乘火车返乡。成效可量化，已全面落实。 Following advocacy for ETS double-track optimisation, over 10,000 people working away from home were able to return to Kluang by train for Chinese New Year 2026. Fully implemented with measurable impact.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2026年2月February 2026 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
💡
推行联署争取亚依淡往居銮公路增设路灯 Petition Approved for Street Lights Along Ayer Hitam–Kluang Road
为保障道路使用者夜间行车安全，向有关当局争取在亚依淡往居銮公路沿线增设路灯。州务大臣已发函批准，联署请愿成功落实。 Petitioned authorities to install street lighting along the Ayer Hitam–Kluang highway for night-time road safety. The Menteri Besar issued written approval — petition successfully realised.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2022年8月August 2022
三
人文社区Humanities & Community
🍜
推动加冕小贩中心重建——延续逾40年历史地标 Coronation Hawker Centre Rebuilt — Preserving a 40-Year Landmark
推动超过40年历史的加冕小贩中心完成重建工程，保留居銮传统饮食文化地标，改善小贩营业与市民用餐环境。重建工程进行中。 Drove the rebuilding of the Coronation Hawker Centre, a heritage food landmark with over 40 years of history in Kluang, improving the business environment for hawkers and dining experience for residents.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2025年5月May 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🎪
主办居銮铁道节——吸引逾4万人次参与 Kluang Rail Festival — Over 40,000 Visitors
协办居銮铁道节文化活动，成功吸引超过四万人次参与，带动本地文旅经济，凝聚社区认同感并推广居銮独特历史文化。 Co-organised the Kluang Rail Festival, attracting over 40,000 visitors, boosting local tourism and the economy, strengthening community identity, and promoting Kluang's unique heritage.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2025年11月November 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
⛰️
拨款 RM15,000 提升南峇山登山设施 RM15,000 Allocated to Upgrade Gunung Lambak Hiking Facilities
拨出RM15,000专款用于提升南峇山（Gunung Lambak）的登山步道及设施，改善市民户外休闲运动环境，促进健康生活。 Allocated RM15,000 to upgrade the hiking trails and facilities at Gunung Lambak, enhancing the outdoor recreation environment for residents and promoting a healthy lifestyle.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2025年5月May 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🌿
倡议南峇山山脚土地划为永久森林保留地 Advocating for Gunung Lambak Foothills as Permanent Forest Reserve
呼吁当局将南峇山山脚土地正式划定为永久森林保留地，保护珍贵天然生态环境，防止土地被开发破坏。建议已提出，仍待州政府批准。 Called on authorities to gazette the foothills of Gunung Lambak as a permanent forest reserve, protecting the natural ecosystem from development. Proposal submitted; awaiting state government approval.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2025年5月May 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
📚
移交500本赠书予居銮9所华文小学 500 Books Donated to 9 Chinese Primary Schools in Kluang
向居銮9所华文小学各移交赠书，共500本，充实学校图书馆资源，鼓励学生多阅读，推动华社教育发展。书籍已完成移交。 Donated a total of 500 books to 9 Chinese primary schools in Kluang, enriching school library collections, encouraging reading habits, and supporting Chinese community education.
✅ 已落实✅ Implemented 📅 2024年9月September 2024 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🚌
倡议为游客提供免费旅游小巴带动居銮自由行 Proposing Free Tourist Shuttle Bus to Boost Kluang Tourism
建议当局为游客提供免费旅游小巴服务，推动居銮本地旅游生态，提升城市吸引力，活络小城旅游经济。建议已提出，尚待当局研究跟进。 Proposed a free tourist shuttle bus service to develop Kluang's local tourism ecosystem, enhance the city's appeal and stimulate the small-town tourist economy. Pending authority review.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2026年4月April 2026 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
四
其他Others
🎓
欢迎政府考虑承认统考文凭报读本地大学 Supporting Recognition of UEC Certificate for Local University Entry
公开表态支持并欢迎政府研究承认独中统考文凭作为本地大学入学资格，捍卫华教权益，推动教育公平。政府层面政策讨论仍在进行。 Publicly expressed support for the government's review of recognising the Unified Examination Certificate (UEC) as a qualification for local university entry, championing Chinese education rights and equal access.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2025年12月December 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🏥
促重启「柔佛健康卡」改善基层医疗资源 Calling for Revival of "Johor Health Card" to Improve Primary Healthcare
促请州政府重新推行「柔佛健康卡」计划，扩大基层医疗覆盖面，让更多低收入居民享有更完善的医疗保障。建议已在州议会提出。 Urged the state government to reinstate the "Johor Health Card" scheme to expand primary healthcare coverage, enabling more low-income residents to access comprehensive medical protection.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2025年7月July 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
📊
促高等教育部公布大学录取数据保障公平 Calling on MOE to Publish University Admission Data for Transparency
要求高等教育部公开透明地发布大学录取数据与录取标准，确保大学录取制度公正透明，保障各族学生平等机会。 Called on the Ministry of Higher Education to publicly release university admission data and criteria, ensuring a fair and transparent admission system with equal opportunities for all students.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2025年7月July 2025 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
🗳️
州议会反对官委议员制度——倡导比例代表制 Opposing Appointed Assemblymen System — Advocating Proportional Representation
在柔佛州议会明确反对官委州议员制度，倡议改采更民主的比例代表制，使州议会组成更真实反映民意。制度改革需经更大政治共识。 Officially spoke against the appointed state assemblyman system in the Johor State Assembly, advocating for a more democratic proportional representation system that better reflects the will of voters.
🔄 推动中🔄 In Progress 📅 2026年5月May 2026 东方日报 →Oriental Daily →
📋

Report Date: 19 May 2026  ·  Constituency: N28 Mengkibol, Kluang District, Johor
